title: BEM-647 channel restored
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists():
        return {}
    try:
        return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except:
        return {}

def exists(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.exists() and p.stat().st_size>0

runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_text=runner.read_text(errors='ignore') if runner.exists() else ''
smoke=load('governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json')
accept=load('governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json')
watch=load('governance/state/bem634_operational_watch_recheck.json')
closure=load('governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json')

checks=[]
checks.append({'name':'codex_runner_yaml_exists','pass':runner.exists(),'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'codex_runner_permissions_valid_static','pass':'permissions:' in runner_text and '  contents: write' in runner_text and '  actions: read' in runner_text and '\nactions: read' not in runner_text,'evidence':str(runner)})
checks.append({'name':'post_repair_smoke_pass','pass':smoke.get('status')=='pass','evidence':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json'})
checks.append({'name':'final_acceptance_accepted','pass':accept.get('status')=='accepted','evidence':'governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json'})
checks.append({'name':'provider_route_architecture_closed','pass':closure.get('architecture_closed') is True,'evidence':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json'})
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
write_channel_restored=not any(x for x in failed if x['name'].startswith('codex_runner') or x['name']=='post_repair_smoke_pass')
architecture_ready=accept.get('status')=='accepted' and closure.get('architecture_closed') is True
status='write_channel_restored_roadmap_resumed' if write_channel_restored and architecture_ready else 'recovery_incomplete'
blocker=None if status=='write_channel_restored_roadmap_resumed' else {'code':'WRITE_CHANNEL_RECOVERY_INCOMPLETE','failed':failed}
operational_watch=[]
if watch.get('delivery_ok') is not True:
    operational_watch.append({'code':'TELEGRAM_DELIVERY_PROOF_PENDING','source':'BEM-634','action':'continue delivery verifier loop'})
if watch.get('claude_runtime_ok') is not True:
    operational_watch.append({'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_PROOF_NOT_CONFIRMED','source':'BEM-634','action':'keep reserve route valid until Claude smoke passes'})

result={'schema_version':'write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume.v1','bem':'BEM-647','status':status,'write_channel_restored':write_channel_restored,'architecture_ready':architecture_ready,'checks':checks,'claude_fix_commit':'61a3f631','post_repair_smoke_commit':'cea99c89306fc6961dd5c78af221559e21f4e0d4','operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:19 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(result,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=reports/'bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume.md'
lines=['# BEM-647 | Write Channel Restored And Roadmap Resume','', 'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:19 (UTC+3)', '', '## Status', status, '', '## Checks']
for x in checks:
    lines.append('- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL')+' | '+x['evidence'])
lines += ['', '## Operational watch', 'null' if not operational_watch else json.dumps(operational_watch,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2), '', '## Blocker', 'null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2)]
report.write_text(sep.join(lines)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume','cycle_id':'bem647-write-channel-restored-and-roadmap-resume','source':'gpt_monitor','status':status,'write_channel_restored':write_channel_restored,'architecture_ready':architecture_ready,'claude_fix_commit':'61a3f631','post_repair_smoke_commit':'cea99c89306fc6961dd5c78af221559e21f4e0d4','operational_watch':operational_watch,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:19 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume']={'status':status,'write_channel_restored':write_channel_restored,'architecture_ready':architecture_ready,'state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':blocker,'operational_watch':operational_watch}
contour_state['codex_runner_write_channel_status']='restored' if write_channel_restored else 'not_restored'
contour_state['roadmap_status']='resumed' if status=='write_channel_restored_roadmap_resumed' else 'blocked'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:19 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem647_write_channel_restored_and_roadmap_resume.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-647 '+status.upper()+': write_channel_restored='+str(write_channel_restored)+' architecture_ready='+str(architecture_ready)+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Confirmed write-channel restoration after Claude repair and BEM-646 smoke; roadmap resumed with operational watch items')
"""
No issue comments.
